creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the same ticket is a question to change
OPTIONS_DEFAULT from MYSQL to SQLITE
as requested from danfe in

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-ports-all/2015-March/089312.html

and approved by the maintainer in

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199059#c3

Can you also commit this change ? That would be very nice!
